Trigger Companion buttons and discover p: Trigger Companion buttons and discover page layouts via HTTP and Satellite APIs.
Enter the host and HTTP port where Bitfo: Enter the host and HTTP port where Bitfocus Companion is running (default 8000). Button label scanning uses the Satellite port (default 16622).
IP address or hostname of the Companion: IP address or hostname of the Companion instance (e.g. 192.168.1.50 or companion.local).
HTTP port Companion listens on. Default: HTTP port Companion listens on. Default is 8000.
TCP port for the Companion Satellite API: TCP port for the Companion Satellite API used to scan button labels. Default is 16622. Enable HTTP API and Satellite button subscriptions in Companion settings.
Press, release, or press-and-release a C: Press, release, or press-and-release a Companion button by label or grid location.
Scans a Companion page and returns butto: Scans a Companion page and returns button labels with row/column locations.
Scans page numbers and returns which pag: Scans page numbers and returns which pages contain buttons. Page names are not available via the HTTP API.
Companion button page number (1-based). Use List Active Pages to discover which pages have buttons. Companion does not expose page names over HTTP.
Pick a button by scanning its on-screen: Pick a button by scanning its on-screen label, or enter row and column manually.
Scans the selected page through the Sate: Scans the selected page through the Satellite API (port 16622 by default). Requires Satellite button subscriptions to be enabled in Companion settings.
Button row on the page (0-based). Row 0: Button row on the page (0-based). Row 0 is the top row of the button grid.
Button column on the page (0-based). Col: Button column on the page (0-based). Column 0 is the leftmost column.
Press & Release runs both down and up ac: Press & Release runs both down and up actions. Press holds the button until you release it separately.
Highest row index to scan when listing b: Highest row index to scan when listing buttons (0-based).
Highest column index to scan when listin: Highest column index to scan when listing buttons (0-based).
Highest page number to check when discov: Highest page number to check when discovering active pages.
